SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.marshalling.xml

Class JkDomDocument

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.marshalling.xml.JkDomDocument
public final class JkDomDocument extends Object
Borrowed from VincerDom https://github.com/djeang/vincer-dom Wrapper for Document offering a Parent-Chaining fluent interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Document
    getW3cDocument()
    Returns thd underlying w3c Document.
    static JkDomDocument
    of(String rootName)
    Creates a document with a root element of the specified name.
    static JkDomDocument
    of(Document w3cDocument)
    Creates a JkDomDocument wrapping the specified w3c document.
    static JkDomDocument
    parse(InputStream inputStream)
    Same as parse(InputStream, DocumentBuilder) but using a default DocumentBuilder.
    static JkDomDocument
    parse(InputStream inputStream, DocumentBuilder documentBuilder)
    Creates a JkDomDocument by parsing the content of specified input stream.
    static JkDomDocument
    parse(String xml)
     
    static JkDomDocument
    parse(Path file)
    Creates a JkDomDocument from the specified xml file.
    void
    print(OutputStream out)
    Outputs xml in the specified stream.
    void
    print(OutputStream out, Consumer<DOMConfiguration> domConfigurationConfigurer)
    Same as print(OutputStream) but caller can modify the default XML transformer using the specified Consumer<Transformer>.
    JkDomElement
    root()
    Returns the root element of this document.
    void
    save(Path file)
    Saves this document in the specified file.
    String
    toXml()
    Returns an XML String representation of this document.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkDomDocument of(Document w3cDocument)
      Creates a JkDomDocument wrapping the specified w3c document.

    • of

      public static JkDomDocument of(String rootName)
      Creates a document with a root element of the specified name.

    • parse

      public static JkDomDocument parse(InputStream inputStream, DocumentBuilder documentBuilder)
      Creates a JkDomDocument by parsing the content of specified input stream. The stream content is parsed with the specified documentBuilder.

    • parse

      public static JkDomDocument parse(InputStream inputStream)
      Same as parse(InputStream, DocumentBuilder) but using a default DocumentBuilder.

    • parse

      public static JkDomDocument parse(String xml)

    • parse

      public static JkDomDocument parse(Path file)
      Creates a JkDomDocument from the specified xml file.

    • getW3cDocument

      public Document getW3cDocument()
      Returns thd underlying w3c Document.

    • root

      public JkDomElement root()
      Returns the root element of this document.

    • print

      public void print(OutputStream out)
      Outputs xml in the specified stream.

    • save

      public void save(Path file)
      Saves this document in the specified file.

    • print

      public void print(OutputStream out, Consumer<DOMConfiguration> domConfigurationConfigurer)
      Same as print(OutputStream) but caller can modify the default XML transformer using the specified Consumer<Transformer>.

    • toXml

      public String toXml()
      Returns an XML String representation of this document.
